description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a green label and a black top, holding 600 ml of beer. The label features prominent social media logos, including a blue Facebook icon with the text 'From facebook' and a barcode beneath it, as well as a large white WhatsApp logo and the word 'WhatsApp' on another side. Nutritional information and ingredients are printed in white text on the green background, wrapping around the can. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, typical of beverage cans. The overall design is modern, with bold, easily readable graphics and a clean layout.
description: A tall green aluminum beer can with social media logos, white text, and a black top with a pull tab. The label is modern and features bold, clear graphics.
description_view_0: The can's side shows nutritional information and ingredients in white text on a green background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the blue Facebook logo, 'From facebook' text, and a barcode beneath it.
description_view_2: The large white WhatsApp logo and the word 'WhatsApp' are prominently displayed on the green label.
description_view_3: The can's top and part of the WhatsApp logo are visible, along with more nutritional information text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a green background with bold white text, large social media logos (Facebook and WhatsApp), and a barcode. The design is clean and modern, using simple typography and high-contrast graphics.
